description_long: This bungalow features a low, wide profile with a complex, multi-sectioned hip roof covered in gray shingles. The exterior walls are clad in dark brown wood paneling, giving it a rustic yet modern appearance. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. A prominent stone chimney rises from one section of the roof, adding architectural interest and suggesting a fireplace inside. The main entrance is centrally located and slightly recessed, flanked by windows on either side. The overall design is compact and single-storied, with no visible porch or veranda.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark wood exterior, gray shingled hip roof, symmetrical windows, and a prominent stone chimney.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and the wide hip roof.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back wall with two windows and the full expanse of the roof.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying the stone chimney, large side windows, and the recessed entrance.
description_view_3: Side view with three windows and a clear view of the roof's slope and texture.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
